insertion_plan.description: DROP TABLE safety lines for #bRanked, #bSlots, #LineBreakdown, and #recon_temp added to the cleanup block at the top of the script
insertion_plan.anchor_snippet: IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#StepFINal') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #StepFINal

insertion_plan.description: SELECT INTO #bRanked (ranked source rows with ROW_NUMBER for OP_Default MAX category) + SELECT INTO #LineBreakdown (one row per charge line with ServiceCategory, PricingMethod, LinePayment, BundledByNCCI). No #bSlots needed — no WINDOW_REDUCTION categories exist. Source is #Step2 joined to #Step4 for suppression. No NCCI bundle step exists so BundledByNCCI = CAST(0 AS TINYINT).
Price_Breakdown_Detail correlated subquery added as the last column in the FINAL_JOIN SELECT (the SELECT that builds #Step7), placed immediately before the INTO #Step7 clause

Auditor Query 1 (full line-level detail SELECT from #LineBreakdown) + INSERT INTO [Automation].[dbo].[LineBreakdown_Results] + Query 2 (reconciliation: SUM of LinePayment per EncounterID from #LineBreakdown vs Price from #Step5), appended after the final OUTPUT SELECT statements
insertion_plan.anchor_snippet:
Select [Status], count(*)
	From #StepFinal
	Group by [Status]
	order by count(*) desc
